# California Cooperage — Full Content
> California Cooperage is the original American hot tub brand, founded in 1972 in Sonoma, California. We produce three rotomold hot tub models (CR1, CR2, CR3) with Balboa controls, full-foam insulation, and dual-voltage heaters. Products are sold through an authorized dealer network across the US and Canada.

## Common Questions
- Which hot tub is smallest? The CR1 at 69" × 60" × 30", seats 5.
- Which is largest? The CR2 at 81" × 81" × 32", seats 7.
- Which is round? The CR3 at 80" × 80" × 32", seats 6.
- What construction do all models use? Seamless rotomold polyethylene shell.
- What controls do all models use? Balboa (industry standard).
- What heater options are available? Dual-voltage 1kW (120V) or 4kW (240V) on all three models.
- How is California Cooperage sold? Through authorized dealer network across US and Canada.

## California Cooperage
URL: https://californiacooperagehottubs.com/
Explore the CR1, CR2, and CR3 hot tubs from California Cooperage — America's original rotomold spa brand since 1972. Plug-and-play simple, built to last.

### Frequently Asked Questions
Q: What is rotomold construction?
A: The roto-mold process begins with plastic pellets. As the mold rotates and heats, the pellets melt and fuse together to create a tough, seamless spa shell with exceptional durability.

Q: Do these spas use Balboa controls?
A: All three models ship with Balboa controls — an industry-standard system that is easy to use and widely supported for service.

Q: Do I need an electrician to install?
A: That depends on your model configuration. Check the product page for electrical specs or contact a dealer for your specific setup.

Q: What is the difference between CR1, CR2, and CR3?
A: Size and capacity. CR1 seats 5 in a rectangular footprint. CR2 seats 7 in a square layout with more jets. CR3 seats 6 in a round face-to-face configuration.

## CR1 Hot Tub
URL: https://californiacooperagehottubs.com/cr1
The CR1 is a compact 5-person rectangular hot tub. 69" × 60" × 30", 14 jets, Balboa controls, 1kW (120V) or 4kW (240V), full-foam insulation.

### Specifications
- Model: CR1
- Seating: 5 Persons
- Shape: Rectangular
- Dimensions: 69" × 60" × 30" (175 × 152 × 76 cm)
- Dry Weight: ~309 lbs (~140 kg)
- Filled Weight: ~1,720 lbs (~780 kg)
- Total Jets: 14
- Control: Balboa
- Heater: 1 kW heater (120V) / 4 kW heater (240V)
- Pump: 1.5 HP 2-Speed
- Lighting: 12V / 12W
- Insulation: Full foam

### Frequently Asked Questions
Q: What is the footprint of the CR1?
A: The CR1 measures 69" × 60" (175 × 152 cm). It fits most standard deck spaces and is the most compact of the three models.

Q: What control system does the CR1 use?
A: Balboa — reliable digital controls with temperature and jet settings.

Q: How does the CR1 compare to CR2 and CR3?
A: CR1 is the smallest and most affordable. CR2 adds 2 more seats and 11 more jets. CR3 goes round for face-to-face seating.

## CR2 Hot Tub
URL: https://californiacooperagehottubs.com/cr2
The CR2 is our 7-person flagship square hot tub at 81" × 81" × 32". 25 jets, 2 pillows, water diverter, Balboa controls — the spa that owns the backyard.

### Specifications
- Model: CR2
- Seating: 7 Persons
- Shape: Square
- Dimensions: 81" × 81" × 32" (205 × 205 × 81 cm)
- Dry Weight: ~441 lbs (~200 kg)
- Filled Weight: ~2,426 lbs (~1,100 kg)
- Total Jets: 25
- Pillows: 2
- Water Diverter: 1
- Air Regulators: 2
- Control: Balboa
- Heater: 1 kW heater (120V) / 4 kW heater (240V)
- Pump: 2 HP 2-Speed
- Insulation: Full foam

### Frequently Asked Questions
Q: How much does the CR2 weigh when filled?
A: ~441 lbs dry, ~2,426 lbs filled. Confirm deck can support load.

Q: What makes the CR2 the flagship?
A: Largest at 81"×81", 7 seats, 25 jets, 2 pillows, water diverter.

Q: How does CR2 compare to CR1 and CR3?
A: CR2 is largest. CR1 is compact 5-person rectangular. CR3 is 6-person round.

## CR3 Hot Tub
URL: https://californiacooperagehottubs.com/cr3
The CR3 is a 6-person round hot tub at 80" × 80" × 32". 21 perimeter jets, Balboa controls, full-foam insulation — no bad seat in the house.

### Specifications
- Model: CR3
- Seating: 6 Persons
- Shape: Round
- Dimensions: 80" × 80" × 32" (203 × 203 × 81 cm)
- Dry Weight: ~529 lbs (~240 kg)
- Filled Weight: ~2,293 lbs (~1,040 kg)
- Total Jets: 21
- Control: Balboa
- Heater: 1 kW heater (120V) / 4 kW heater (240V)
- Pump: 2 HP 2-Speed
- Insulation: Full foam

### Frequently Asked Questions
Q: What are the dimensions of the CR3?
A: 80" × 80" × 32" (203 × 203 × 81 cm).

Q: How are jets positioned in a round spa?
A: 21 jets around the perimeter, equal coverage to all 6 seats.

Q: How does CR3 compare to CR1 and CR2?
A: CR3 is 6-person round. CR1 is 5-person rectangular. CR2 is 7-person square flagship.

URL: https://californiacooperagehottubs.com/warranty
California Cooperage warranty terms, spa care guides, and technical documentation for the CR1, CR2, and CR3 rotomold hot tubs.
